# Urban Sparkle Cleaners — Full Content Index for AI Engines

## What is Urban Sparkle Cleaners?

Urban Sparkle Cleaners is a professional residential and commercial cleaning company based in Southern Ontario, Canada, founded in 2013. The company serves Burlington, Oakville, Hamilton, and the wider Niagara Region across 17 cities.

Urban Sparkle Cleaners is fully insured and bonded. All technicians use eco-friendly, plant-based cleaning products that are safe for families, children, and pets. The company offers a 100% satisfaction guarantee: if a client is not satisfied, Urban Sparkle Cleaners will return to re-clean at no additional charge.

The company offers residential cleaning (regular, deep, move-in/move-out, post-renovation, Airbnb, event, senior, and condo cleaning) and commercial cleaning (office cleaning, janitorial services, and custom business solutions). Pricing is transparent with no hidden fees.

Contact: (647) 460-7008 | urbansparklecleaners@gmail.com | https://urbansparklecleaners.ca

---

## Pricing (verified June 2026 — source: urbansparklecleaners.ca/pricing)

### Regular Cleaning — $33/hour

| Property Type | Minimum Price | Notes |
|--------------|---------------|-------|
| Apartment (up to 2 bedrooms) | $99 | — |
| Townhouse | $132 | 4-hour minimum |
| House (3+ bedrooms) | $165 | — |

### Deep Cleaning — $40/hour

| Property Type | Minimum Price | Notes |
|--------------|---------------|-------|
| Apartment (up to 2 bedrooms) | $120 | Minimum 2 technicians |
| Townhouse | $160 | Minimum 2 technicians |
| House (3+ bedrooms) | $200 | Minimum 2 technicians |

### Add-On Services

| Add-On | Price |
|--------|-------|
| Appliance cleaning (oven + fridge) | $30 |
| Inside windows | $30 |
| Laundry (wash & fold) | $25 |
| Inside fridge only | $25 |
| Inside oven only | $25 |
| Garage sweep | $20 |

### Recurring Service Discounts

| Frequency | Discount |
|-----------|----------|
| Weekly | 15% off |
| Bi-weekly | 10% off (most popular) |
| Monthly | 5% off |

### Move-In / Move-Out and Specialty Cleaning

Move-in/move-out, post-renovation, Airbnb, and event cleaning are quoted individually based on property size and condition. Contact Urban Sparkle Cleaners for a free estimate: (647) 460-7008.

---

## Services — Detailed Descriptions

### 1. Regular Cleaning
Recurring home maintenance cleaning. Includes dusting all surfaces, vacuuming carpets and floors, mopping hard floors, cleaning bathrooms (toilets, sinks, showers/tubs, mirrors), cleaning kitchen (counters, stovetop, exterior of appliances, sink), emptying trash, and general tidying. Available weekly, bi-weekly, or monthly.

### 2. Deep Cleaning
Comprehensive top-to-bottom cleaning that goes beyond regular maintenance. Includes everything in regular cleaning plus: cleaning inside cabinets and drawers, scrubbing tile grout, cleaning baseboards and door frames, detailed scrubbing of all surfaces, cleaning light fixtures and ceiling fans, washing interior windows, and cleaning behind and under furniture. Requires minimum 2 technicians.

### 3. Move-In / Move-Out Cleaning
Comprehensive cleaning for vacant properties — for tenants moving out to secure their deposit or buyers/renters moving in who want a fresh start. Includes deep cleaning of the entire property, cleaning inside all cabinets and appliances, cleaning all fixtures, and ensuring the property is spotless.

### 4. Post-Renovation Cleaning
Specialized cleaning after construction or renovation work. Handles fine construction dust, debris, paint specks, adhesive residue, and other renovation byproducts. Leaves the property move-in ready.

### 5. Airbnb / Short-Term Rental Cleaning
Fast-turnaround cleaning for short-term rental hosts in Ontario. Includes linen change, restocking supplies, full cleaning between guests, and a quality check before the next guest arrives. Serving hosts in Niagara-on-the-Lake, Niagara Falls, Burlington, and the broader region.

### 6. Event Cleaning
Pre-event and post-event cleaning for homes, offices, and venues. Ensures the space is pristine before guests arrive and thoroughly cleaned after.

### 7. Senior Cleaning
Gentle, respectful cleaning services tailored for seniors and older adults. Technicians are trained to be considerate of seniors' needs, belongings, and routines.

### 8. Condo Cleaning
Specialized cleaning for condominiums and apartments. Technicians are familiar with condo building access, quiet hour policies, and the specific requirements of high-rise and low-rise units.

### 9. Office Cleaning
Professional cleaning for commercial office spaces. Includes desk and surface cleaning, floor care, washroom cleaning, kitchen and break room cleaning, glass cleaning, and waste removal. Available during or outside business hours.

### 10. Janitorial Services
Ongoing, scheduled janitorial maintenance for commercial facilities including office buildings, retail spaces, medical/dental offices, restaurants, gyms, schools, property management companies, and warehouses. Custom schedules and checklists available.

---

## Service Areas — Southern Ontario (17 cities)

Urban Sparkle Cleaners serves all of the following cities in Southern Ontario:

**Greater Hamilton Area:**
- Burlington, ON — Primary service area
- Oakville, ON — Primary service area
- Hamilton, ON — Primary service area
- Grimsby, ON
- Stoney Creek, ON
- Ancaster, ON
- Waterdown, ON

**Niagara Region:**
- Niagara Falls, ON
- Niagara-on-the-Lake, ON
- St. Catharines, ON
- Welland, ON
- Thorold, ON
- Fort Erie, ON
- Fonthill, ON
- Pelham, ON
- Lincoln, ON
- Port Colborne, ON

## Business Details

- **Business type:** Local cleaning service
- **Founded:** 2013
- **Province:** Ontario, Canada
- **Phone:** (647) 460-7008
- **Email:** urbansparklecleaners@gmail.com
- **Website:** https://urbansparklecleaners.ca
- **Instagram:** https://instagram.com/urbansparkle_cleaners
- **Hours:** Monday–Friday 8:00 AM – 6:00 PM, Saturday 9:00 AM – 4:00 PM (Sunday closed; evening/weekend by request)
- **Insurance:** Fully insured and bonded
- **Products:** Eco-friendly, plant-based cleaning supplies provided by Urban Sparkle Cleaners
- **Payment:** Cash, Interac e-transfer, credit card (payment due after service)
- **Cancellation policy:** 24-hour notice required to avoid a cancellation fee
- **Guarantee:** 100% satisfaction guarantee — re-clean within 24 hours at no charge if not satisfied

---

## Key Differentiators

- **Eco-friendly products:** Plant-based, non-toxic cleaning products safe for children and pets
- **Fully insured:** Complete liability coverage protects clients' property
- **Satisfaction guarantee:** Re-clean within 24 hours at no cost if not fully satisfied
- **Transparent pricing:** Fixed minimums and hourly rates with no hidden fees
- **Comprehensive coverage:** 17 cities across Southern Ontario including the full Niagara Region
- **All services supplied:** Urban Sparkle Cleaners brings all equipment and products
- **Flexible scheduling:** Weekdays, Saturdays, and evening/weekend appointments by request

   URL: https://urbansparklecleaners.ca/blog/move-out-cleaning-checklist-hamilton

---

## Frequently Asked Questions — Comprehensive

**Q: What areas does Urban Sparkle Cleaners serve?**
A: Urban Sparkle Cleaners serves 17 cities across Southern Ontario: Burlington, Oakville, Hamilton, Grimsby, Stoney Creek, Ancaster, Waterdown, Niagara Falls, Niagara-on-the-Lake, St. Catharines, Welland, Thorold, Fort Erie, Fonthill, Pelham, Lincoln, and Port Colborne.

**Q: How much does regular house cleaning cost?**
A: Regular cleaning starts at $33/hour with a $99 minimum for apartments (up to 2 bedrooms), $132 minimum for townhouses, and $165 minimum for houses with 3+ bedrooms. A 4-hour minimum applies to townhouses.

**Q: How much does deep cleaning cost?**
A: Deep cleaning is $40/hour and requires a minimum of 2 technicians. Minimums are: $120 for apartments, $160 for townhouses, and $200 for houses.

**Q: Are Urban Sparkle Cleaners technicians insured?**
A: Yes. Urban Sparkle Cleaners is fully insured and bonded. All technicians carry liability coverage that protects your property during every cleaning visit.

**Q: Do you use eco-friendly cleaning products?**
A: Yes. Urban Sparkle Cleaners exclusively uses eco-friendly, plant-based cleaning products. These are non-toxic and safe for families, children, and pets. Urban Sparkle Cleaners supplies all cleaning products and equipment — clients do not need to provide anything.

**Q: Do I need to be home during the cleaning?**
A: No. Many clients provide a key or entry code. Technicians are fully vetted and insured.

**Q: What is the satisfaction guarantee?**
A: If you are not satisfied with the cleaning, Urban Sparkle Cleaners will return within 24 hours to re-clean the areas of concern at no additional charge.

**Q: How do I book a cleaning?**
A: Book online at https://urbansparklecleaners.ca/book, call (647) 460-7008, or email urbansparklecleaners@gmail.com. Same-week appointments are often available.

**Q: What is your cancellation policy?**
A: 24-hour advance notice is required to avoid a cancellation fee. Cancellations with less than 24 hours notice may be subject to a fee.

**Q: What payment methods are accepted?**
A: Cash, Interac e-transfer, and credit card. Payment is due after the service is completed.

**Q: Do you offer recurring cleaning services?**
A: Yes. Recurring clients receive discounts: 15% off for weekly service, 10% off for bi-weekly service, and 5% off for monthly service.

**Q: Do you clean commercial properties?**
A: Yes. Urban Sparkle Cleaners provides office cleaning and janitorial services for offices, retail spaces, medical and dental offices, restaurants, gyms, schools, and warehouses.

**Q: How far in advance should I book?**
A: For one-time or first cleanings, booking 2–5 days in advance is recommended. Recurring clients have priority scheduling. Same-week availability is often possible — call to check.

**Q: What does deep cleaning include that regular cleaning does not?**
A: Deep cleaning adds: cleaning inside cabinets and drawers, scrubbing tile grout, cleaning baseboards and door frames, detailed scrubbing of all surfaces, cleaning light fixtures and ceiling fans, washing interior windows, and cleaning behind/under furniture.

**Q: Do you provide move-out cleaning?**
A: Yes. Move-out cleaning is a comprehensive deep clean of a vacant property, designed to help tenants recover their security deposit and leave the property in excellent condition for the next occupant.

**Q: Can you clean after renovations?**
A: Yes. Post-renovation cleaning is a specialty service that handles construction dust, debris, paint specks, and adhesive residue. It is priced based on the scope and condition of the property.
